name: data-list
description: A divided list surface: a real <ul role="list"> whose <li> rows (data-list.row) are ruled by a hairline divide and split into a leading media slot + a left content column + a right actions cluster. The container ships the optional bordered card chrome + the divide rule; data-list.row ships the row (role=listitem, leading/content/actions slots, optional whole-tile href link, hoverHighlight tint, SAFE dataAttrs channel). The read-only LIST display primitive for the kit's infolist / RepeatableEntry and panelled record lists, distinct from item (a single composable row) and data-table (a sortable/selectable grid). Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the data-list partial (+ its data-list/row child) to your JTE root at lievit/data-list.jte, reached as @template.lievit.data-list(content=@`...`). Stack data-list.row rows inside it (each a real <li role="listitem" with leading / content / actions slots). Pass ariaLabel to label the list for assistive tech. Pass bordered=false for a flush, inline list with no card chrome. On the row: pass href for a whole-tile <a> link (block-display inside the <li>); hoverHighlight=false for non-interactive rows; dataAttrs for SAFE escaped data-* (per-row DB values). The source is yours: edit freely.
